# Task
Name: prompt/stage-worker
Title: Stage worker instructions
Branch: prompt/stage-worker
Directory: .subtask/tasks/prompt--stage-worker

## Workspace
Your working directory is `/tmp/ws`. This IS your copy of the project — a git worktree of `main` on branch `prompt/stage-worker`.

- Use paths relative to cwd, or absolute paths under cwd.
- Never use absolute paths to other clones of this project (e.g. `/Users/.../Code/<projectname>`). Edits outside your worktree will not appear on your task branch and will not merge.
- If unsure, run `pwd` and `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — both should match cwd.

## Description
Implement then review.

## Workflow
Track progress in PROGRESS.json.

## Stage: review
Findings only — do NOT modify files.
Write your review to REVIEW.md using:
  Critical / Important / Minor / Out-of-scope

--------------------

Review now.
